create.title: Create a shared table
create.pinHelper: Share this PIN only with your guests — they'll need it to join.
create.capHelper: Maximum guests who can join this table. You can change it later.

errors.tableFull: Table is full. Ask the host to raise the limit.
errors.tableClosed: This table is closed. You can't join.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in a moment.

host.closeConfirm: Close this table? New guests won't be able to join, but anyone already at the table stays.
host.emptyState: No guests yet. Share the link or PIN so they can start picking dishes.

tray.title: My picks
tray.leaveConfirm: Leave this table? Your picks will be cleared.
tray.empty: No picks yet. Add something from the menu.
